publishedAbstract: * The [Rook Upstream documentation](https://rook.io/docs/rook/v1.10/Storage-Configuration/Monitoring/ceph-dashboard/#enable-the-ceph-dashboard) describes the steps to expose the Dashboard for the internal Ceph Storage Cluster deployed. * Are these steps valid for Openshift Data Foundation? * Is this supported?
publishedTitle: Is it possible to expose the Red Hat Ceph Storage Dashboard in Openshift Data Foundation?
